_label_note: AUTO-LABELED by LLM. Spot-check before refreshing recall.lock.json. Lock updates must include this provenance in --reason per item 16.
_label_tier_note: Post-CN/AE precision realignment: must_detect is aligned to current strict deterministic engine output; prior strict labels remain preserved in ideal_must_detect for gap discovery. This reconciles labels made stale by narrow public-line, functional-contact, educational MNPI, negated MAC, negated genetic-data, and benign term-sheet/spa guards.

_stage_b_approval.basis: Project owner stated they manually reviewed the AU Stage B generated/reconciled tests and approved them for internal/project benchmarking. This is not legal advice, external counsel review, or procurement-grade legal approval; candidate labels remain separate from locked recall baselines.
_stage_b_approval.scope: AU Stage B candidate labels only; no recall-lock promotion.

_strict_reconciliation.basis: Existing approved candidate labels were realigned where narrow detector precision fixes correctly suppressed false-positive bait. This is internal benchmark maintenance, not legal advice or procurement-grade review.
_strict_reconciliation.prior_label_note: AU Stage B cleanup: must_detect is the strict detector-aligned benchmark tier; ideal_must_detect preserves broader auto-labeled statutory coverage for gap discovery. Pending labels still require project-owner approval before promotion-ready status.
_strict_reconciliation.strict_source: PreSendReviewEngine.review(..., review_profile='strict') after CN/AE precision guards
